batch_summary: Deed [333] — Navarro County Electric Cooperative Inc. Utility Easement and Covenant of Access. Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Trustee) granted a perpetual utility easement to NCEC across 252.23 acres of the Wm Ritchie Survey A-527 in Freestone County. Executed November 29, 2010; filed March 3, 2011 (FC Doc# 01101159, OR/1542/657). The easement was granted for the purpose of providing electric service to Trey and Sylvana Padgett (Sylvana = James Allen Black's daughter, Trust No. 2 remainder beneficiary). Easement width: 30 ft for primary lines (>600V), 20 ft for service lines (<600V); height: 15 ft below surface to 70 ft above ground. Boundary references: N-Miriam Bounds, S-Shows, E-FM246, W-Old Wortham Lake. Beard signed in McLennan County. ISSUE-43 item 19 marked PULLED. New person identified: Trey Padgett (Sylvana's husband/partner). No mineral impact (surface easement only).

03_DEED_CHAIN_SUMMARY.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [333] added to Phase 5 — Utility Easement, Trust No. 2 (Beard, Trustee) → Navarro County Electric Cooperative Inc (11/29/2010, 252.23 ac Richie A-527 Freestone); ISSUE-43 item 19 PULLED

operations.description: Add deed [333] entry to Phase 5 section, after deed [332]
operations.content: 6. `2010-11-29_[333]_f` — Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Trustee) → Navarro County Electric Cooperative, Inc. (utility easement, Freestone) — **Utility Easement and Covenant of Access.** 252.23 acres, Wm Ritchie Survey, Abstract #527, Freestone County. Perpetual easement for electric and other utility service. Easement width: 30 feet for primary lines energized at more than 600 volts; 20 feet for service lines energized at less than 600 volts. Height: 15 feet beneath surface to 70 feet above ground. Includes pedestrian and vehicular ingress and egress. **Easement for**: Trey + Sylvana Padgett (handwritten on form — confirms Padgetts receiving electric service on Trust No. 2 property). Property bounded: N-Miriam Bounds, S-Shows, E-FM246, W-Old Wortham Lake; located 4 miles NE from Wortham. Form notation: "John PBlack + Olena B Black" handwritten above form (identifying trust creators, not additional grantors); Property Owner field: "Trust # 2". No mineral impact — surface easement only. Acknowledged Nov 29, 2010, McLennan County, before Brandi Jo Meador NP (exp. Dec 21, 2013). Filed Mar 3, 2011 09:36 AM; Linda Jarvis, County Clerk, Freestone County; Deputy: Levi Whiteside. Fee: $16.00; Receipt: 105497. FC Doc# 01101159; OR Vol. 1542, Pg. 657 (1 page). ⚠️ **County Clerk transition**: deed [332] (filed Dec 2006) shows Mary Lynn White as FC County Clerk with Linda Jarvis as Deputy; deed [333] (filed Mar 2011) shows Linda Jarvis as County Clerk — confirms Jarvis succeeded White between 2006 and 2011. ISSUE-43 item 19. Phase 5
